name: Popit World
description: Popit World – Pop, Relax & Unlock New Objects! Dive into Popit World, the most relaxing and addictive game for all ages. Explore a colorful universe full of adorable objects: ice creams, cats, flowers, kawaii shapes and many more surprises. Each popit is designed for you to enjoy pressing every bubble while you unwind and have fun. Your goal is simple and super satisfying: press all the bubbles to complete each popit and unlock new objects. But don’t get too comfortable… if you take too long, the bubbles will reset and you’ll have to start again! Test your skills in Time Trial Mode, where you must press as many popits as possible before
